hero.heading: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Our team is available Monday–Friday, 9AM–4PM PST. We typically respond within one business day.

sidebar.heading: We're Here to Help
sidebar.description: Whether you need help with account setup, protocol questions, or ordering — our team of peptide specialists is ready to assist licensed clinicians.
sidebar.accessNote: PeptidePure™ is a clinician-only platform. To request account access, please provide your NPI number and professional credentials in the form.

form.heading: Send a Message
form.disclaimer: By submitting this form, you confirm that you are a licensed healthcare professional.

successMessage.heading: Message Sent!
successMessage.text: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our team will contact you within one business day.
